Part.Source:
parm(in:&DeOndeVem, in:&parmProCod, in:&TabNum, in:&TabAltCod, in:&IsProdutoComGrade);
prompt(PromptProdutoGradeRef, &EmpCod, &ProCod, &ProGraCod, &CodigoProduto);

Event Start tbDadosAntecipacao.Visible = 0 LoadWWPContext.Call(&Context) &EmpCod = &Context.EmpCod retornaAutorizacao.Call('WWTABELAPRECO', Status_SimNao.Sim, 2, &AutNiv) txtaviso.ForeColor = RGB(150,0,0) txtavisoComposto.ForeColor = RGB(255,100,0) Tvaviso.Visible = 0 txtComposto.Visible = 0 &ProGraCod = 1 &AtualizarMarKup = true padraoUsuario.Call('L', '#ATUALIZARACRESCIMO#', &Context.PesCod, &Context.EmpCod, &PadObs, &PadDtaMod) If &PadObs = '0' &AtualizarMarKup = false EndIf /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &MarProVlrVda.TooltipText = "Sugestão de Venda pelo Markup" &MarProIMC.TooltipText = "[Margem de Contribuição] sobre o Custo" &ProVlrVda.TooltipText = "Sugestão de Venda pelo [% acréscimo]." &ProIMC.TooltipText = "% Acréscimo, [Margem de Venda]. Utilizado para Calcular a Sugestão de Venda." &TabRecCol.TooltipText = "Ao trocar o Valor da Coluna 1 Automaticamente o Sistema Recalcula o valor para as Outras colunas." &TabIsPerCol1.TooltipText = "Marcando essa opção o Sistema vai calcular o valor das colunas utilizando valor Base Coluna 1." Do 'AttributesSecurityCode' &ProGraCod.Visible = False &EmpCod.Visible = False GridComposicao_Empowerer.GridInternalName = GridComposicao.InternalName GridComposicao.Rows = Page.Rows &GridComposicaoCurrentPage = 1 &GridComposicaoCurrentPage.Visible = False &GridComposicaoPageCount = -1 GridComposicaoPaginationBar.RowsPerPageSelectedValue = GridComposicao.Rows /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ TituloPagina.Caption = 'Adicionando Produto Tabela Preço ' + trim(&TabNum) &ProCod = &ParmProCod if &ProCod <> 0 For Each Order EmpCod, ProCod Where EmpCod = &EmpCod Where ProCod = &ProCod &CodigoProduto = trim(ProRef) Exit EndFor Endif &ProNom = '<-- INFORME O CÓDIGO DO PRODUTO' Do 'LoadProdutoTabela' //carrega os componentes quando o codigo já vem por parâmetro if &ProCod <> 0 AND &DeOndeVem <> 'P' do 'AttributesSecurityCode' gridComposicao.Refresh() wcCustoFornecedor.object = wpAdicionaProdutoTabelaFornecedor.Create(&ProCod) wcCongela.Object = wcAdicionaProdutoTabCongelada.Create(&EmpCod, &TabNum, &ProCod, &ProGraCod) EndIF &CodigoProduto.SetFocus() EndEvent Event Refresh &TotalComposicaoMoeda = 0 TableAttributes.Visible = 0 //Tvaviso.Visible = 0 If &DeOndeVem = 'P' TituloPagina.Visible = 0 EndiF /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ //The variable '&GridComposicaoPageCount' must be assigned manually in order to get a correct behaviour of the Pagination Bar. //Code block: LoadWWPContext LoadWWPContext.Call(&Context) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ &GridComposicaoPageCount = gridComposicao.PageCount &GridComposicaoCurrentPage = GridComposicao.CurrentPage &EmpCod = &Context.EmpCod RetornaColunas_Nome.Call(&EmpCod, &TabNum, &sdtColunasTabela) &TabIsAntAcr = &SdtColunasTabela.TabIsAntAcr For Each Order EmpCod, TabCod Where EmpCod = &EmpCod Where TabCod = &TabNum &TabUltAlt = TabUltAlt &TabIsPerCol1 = TabIsPerCol1 &TabRecCol = TabRecCol if TabIsAntAcr = true tbDadosAntecipacao.Visible = true tbVencimento.Visible = 0 Endif Exit EndFor TextBlockTabPrc1.Caption = &sdtColunasTabela.TabColNom1.Trim() If &sdtColunasTabela.Tem2 = 0 &TabPrc2.Visible = 0 Else &TabPrc2.Caption = &sdtColunasTabela.TabColNom2.trim() EndIF If &sdtColunasTabela.Tem3 = 0 &TabPrc3.Visible = 0 Else &TabPrc3.Caption = &sdtColunasTabela.TabColNom3.trim() EndIF If &sdtColunasTabela.Tem4 = 0 &TabPrc4.Visible = 0 Else &TabPrc4.Caption = &sdtColunasTabela.TabColNom4.trim() EndIF If &sdtColunasTabela.Tem5 = 0 &TabPrc5.Visible = 0 Else &TabPrc5.Caption = &sdtColunasTabela.TabColNom5.trim() EndIF If &sdtColunasTabela.Tem6 = 0 &TabPrc6.Visible = 0 Else &TabPrc6.Caption = &sdtColunasTabela.TabColNom6.trim() EndIF If &sdtColunasTabela.Tem7 = 0 &TabPrc7.Visible = 0 Else &TabPrc7.Caption = &sdtColunasTabela.TabColNom7.trim() EndIF If &sdtColunasTabela.Tem8 = 0 &TabPrc8.Visible = 0 Else &TabPrc8.Caption = &sdtColunasTabela.TabColNom8.trim() EndIF If &sdtColunasTabela.Tem9 = 0 &TabPrc9.Visible = 0 Else &TabPrc9.Caption = &sdtColunasTabela.TabColNom9.trim() EndIF if &ProGraCod.IsEmpty() &ProGraCod = 1 EndIF EndEvent Event GridComposicao.Load /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ //this code should be inside the For Each used to load the grid &UpdateComposicao = !'' &DeleteComposicao = !'' &CompoTabPrcCmpItmCod = TabPrcCmpItmCod &CompoProGraRef = TabPrcRecProGraRef &CompoProNomGra = TabPrcRecProNomGra &CompoTabPrcRecProQtd = TabPrcRecProQtd &CompoTabPrcRecProCod = TabPrcRecProCod &CompoTabPrcRecProGraCod = TabPrcRecProGraCod &CompoTabPrc1 = TabPrcRecTabPrcTot /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ &TotalComposicaoMoeda += &CompoTabPrc1 EndEvent Event GridComposicaoPaginationBar.ChangePage /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do Case Case GridComposicaoPaginationBar.SelectedPage = !'Previous' &GridComposicaoCurrentPage -= 1 GridComposicao.PreviousPage() Case GridComposicaoPaginationBar.SelectedPage = !'Next' &GridComposicaoCurrentPage += 1 GridComposicao.NextPage() Otherwise &PageToGo.FromString(GridComposicaoPaginationBar.SelectedPage) &GridComposicaoCurrentPage = &PageToGo GridComposicao.GotoPage(&PageToGo) EndCase Refresh /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event GridComposicaoPaginationBar.ChangeRowsPerPage /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ GridComposicao.Rows = GridComposicaoPaginationBar.RowsPerPageSelectedValue &GridComposicaoCurrentPage = 1 GridComposicao.FirstPage() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'Dovolltar' Return /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'DoLogAlteracao' &LogErpRegKey = trim(&ProRef) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ LogAlteracao_Modal.Confirm() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event LogAlteracao_Modal.OnLoadComponent /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ WWPAux_WC.Object = wwLogRegistrosIndividual.Create(&LogErpRegKey, 'TABELAPRECOPRODUTOS') /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'DoDeletar' If &ProCod <> 0 /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ DVelop_ConfirmPanel_Deletar.Confirm() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ Else msg('Nenhum produto Informado para Eliminação!') &CodigoProduto.SetEmpty() EndIF EndEvent Event DVelop_ConfirmPanel_Deletar.Close /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ If DVelop_ConfirmPanel_Deletar.Result = !'Yes' Do 'Do Action Deletar' EndIf /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'DoADD' wpAdicionaProdutoComposicao.Popup('ADD', &EmpCod, &TabNum, &ProCod, &ProGraCod, 0) Refresh /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Sub 'Do Action Deletar' GravaProdutoNaTabela.Call(&EmpCod, &TabNum, &TabUltAlt, &ProCod, &ProGraCod, 'DEL', &TabProDtaIni, &TabProDtaFin, &TabPrc1, &TabPrc2, &TabPrc3, &TabPrc4, &TabPrc5, &TabPrc6,&TabPrc7,&TabPrc8,&TabPrc9, &Context.UserName) do 'limpaCampos' Refresh /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'AttributesSecurityCode' RetornaConfSistema.Call(&Context.EmPCod, &Context.FilCod, domConfSistema.TCon083_Markup, &TCon083_Markup) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ If Not (&TabPerAnt> 0) &TabDtaVct.Visible = False TabDtaVct_Cell.Class = !'Invisible' Else &TabDtaVct.Visible = True TabDtaVct_Cell.Class = !'DscTop' EndIf tbRMarg.Visible = (&TCon083_Markup <> 'S') tbLMarg.Visible = (&TCon083_Markup = 'S') /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Event &TabPerAnt.IsValid do 'AttributesSecurityCode' EndEvent Event Enter if &TabPrcIsTip = TipoPrecoVenda.PRECO_COMPOSICAO and &TotalComposicaoMoeda > 0 &TabPrc1 = &TotalComposicaoMoeda if &TabPrc1 > 9999999999 msg('Valor muito alto, Verifique!') &CodigoProduto.SetFocus() Else If &IsInsert = true or &TabRecCol = true do 'CarregaValores' EndIF EndiF do 'NovaMarkup' Endif if &AtualizarMarKup.ToString() <> &PadObs &PadObs = trim(&AtualizarMarKup.ToString()) padraoUsuario.Call('G', '#ATUALIZARACRESCIMO#', &Context.PesCod, &Context.EmpCod, &PadObs, &PadDtaMod) EndIf If &TabPrc1 = 0 msg('Preço da primeira coluna não pode ser zero!') &TabPrc1.SetFocus() Else If &ProCod <> 0 GravaProdutoNaTabela.Call(&EmpCod, &TabNum, &TabUltAlt, &ProCod, &ProGraCod, 'ADD', &TabProDtaIni, &TabProDtaFin, &TabPrc1, &TabPrc2, &TabPrc3, &TabPrc4, &TabPrc5,&TabPrc6,&TabPrc7,&TabPrc8,&TabPrc9, &Context.userName) GravaProdutoNaTabelaAdicional.Call(&EmpCod, &TabNum, &TabUltAlt, &ProCod, &ProGraCod, &TabPrcIsTip, &TabPerAcr, &TabPerAnt, &TabDtaVct, &Context.UserName) prcAtualizaPrecoVenda_Composicao1.Call(&EmpCod, &TabNum, &ProCod, &ProGraCod, &Context.UserName) if &AtualizarMarKup = true if &TCon083_Markup = 'S' &novaMargem = 100 - &novaMargem Do Case Case &novaMargem < 0 &novaMargem = 0 Case &novaMargem > 100 &novaMargem = 99.99 EndCase GravaIMC.Call(&EmpCod, &ProCod, 0, 0, 0, 0, &novaMargem, true) Else GravaAcrescimoVenda.call(&EmpCod, &ProCod, &novaMargem) Endif Endif do 'limpaCampos' &ProCod.SetEmpty() &CodigoProduto.SetEmpty() If &parmProCod <> 0 if &IsProdutoComGrade = true and &DeOndeVem <> 'P' //Prompt wpeditagrade.Link(&EmpCod, &parmProCod, &DeOndeVem) Else Do Case CAse &DeOndeVem = 'Produto' or &DeOndeVem = 'Produtos' Produtos.Link('', TrnMode.Insert, &EmpCod, 0, '') CAse &DeOndeVem = 'ImpProduto' ImpProduto.Link(TrnMode.Insert, &EmpCod, 0) Case &DeOndeVem = 'WWIMPPRODUTO' wwImpProduto.Link() Case &DeOndeVem = 'WWPRODUTO' wwProduto.Link() Case &DeOndeVem = 'P' //prompt return EndCase EndiF Else &CodigoProduto.SetFocus() EndIF EndIF EndIf EndEvent Event &TabPrc1.IsValid If &TabPrc1 = 0 &CodigoProduto.SetEmpty() EndIF if &TabPrc1 > 9999999999 msg('Valor muito alto, Verifique!') &CodigoProduto.SetFocus() Else If &IsInsert = true or &TabRecCol = true do 'CarregaValores' EndIF EndiF do 'NovaMarkup' EndEvent Event &CodigoProduto.IsValid Tvaviso.Visible = 0 txtComposto.Visible = 0 &TotalComposicaoMoeda = 0 &NovoProBar = Substr(trim(&CodigoProduto),1, 18) RetornaProdutoReferencia.Call(&EmpCod, &NovoProBar, &ProCod, &ProGraCod, &ProNom, &IsAchouProduto, &ProReqVlr, &ProReqQtd, &ProBarQTd, &mensagemErro) &TabPrc1.SetEmpty() &TabPrc2.SetEmpty() &TabPrc3.SetEmpty() &TabPrc4.SetEmpty() &TabPrc5.SetEmpty() &TabProDtaFin.SetEmpty() &TabProDtaini.SetEmpty() &ProVlrCus.SetEmpty() &ProNom = '<-- INFORME O CÓDIGO DO PRODUTO' Do 'LoadProdutoTabela' if &ProCod <> 0 do 'AttributesSecurityCode' gridComposicao.Refresh() wcCustoFornecedor.object = wpAdicionaProdutoTabelaFornecedor.Create(&ProCod) wcCongela.Object = wcAdicionaProdutoTabCongelada.Create(&EmpCod, &TabNum, &ProCod, &ProGraCod) &TabPrc1.SetFocus() Else If not &CodigoProduto.IsEmpty() msg('PRODUTO NÃO LOCALIZADO!') EndiF &CodigoProduto.SetFocus() EndIF EndEvent Event 'PromptProdutoF4' 4 PromptProdutoGradeRef.Popup(&EmpCod, &ProCod, &ProGraCod, &CodigoProduto) &CodigoProduto.SetFocus() EndEvent Event &UpdateComposicao.Click wpAdicionaProdutoComposicao.Popup('UPD', &EmpCod, &TabNum, &ProCod, &ProGraCod, &CompoTabPrcCmpItmCod) Refresh EndEvent Event &DeleteComposicao.Click wpAdicionaProdutoComposicao.Popup('DEL', &EmpCod, &TabNum, &ProCod, &ProGraCod, &CompoTabPrcCmpItmCod) Refresh EndEvent Sub 'NovaMarkup' &novaMargem = 0 if &TCon083_Markup = 'S' if &TabPrc1 > 0 and &ProVlrCus > 0 &novaMargem = (&ProVlrCus / &TabPrc1) * 100 Do Case Case &novaMargem < 0 &novaMargem = 0 Case &novaMargem > 100 &novaMargem = 99.99 EndCase EndiF NovoMarkup.Caption = 'NOVO MARKUP: '+ trim(toformattedString(&novaMargem)) + ' %' else if &TabPrc1 > 0 and &ProVlrCus > 0 &novaMargem = ((&TabPrc1 / &ProVlrCus) * 100) - 100 Do Case Case &novaMargem < 0 &novaMargem = 0 Case &novaMargem > 1000 &novaMargem = 999.99 EndCase Endif NovoMarkup.Caption = 'ACRÉSCIMO: '+ trim(toformattedString(&novaMargem)) + ' %' Endif EndSub Sub 'LoadProdutoTabela' do 'limpaCampos' if &ProCod <> 0 For Each Order EmpCod, TabCod, ProCod, ProGraCod, TabAltCod Where EmpCod = &EmpCod Where TabCod = &TabNum Where ProCod = &ProCod Where TabAltCod = &TabAltCod Where ProGraCod = &ProGraCod &ProRef = ProGraRef &ProNom = ProNomGra &ProIsGra = ProIsGra &CodigoProduto = ProGraRef &TabPrc1 = TabPrc1 &TabPrc2 = TabPrc2 &TabPrc3 = TabPrc3 &TabPrc4 = TabPrc4 &TabPrc5 = TabPrc5 &TabPrc6 = TabPrc6 &TabPrc7 = TabPrc7 &TabPrc8 = TabPrc8 &TabPrc9 = TabPrc9 &TabPerAcr = TabPerAcr &TabPerAnt = TabPerAnt &TabDtaVct = TabDtaVct &TabProDtaIni = TabProDtaIni &TabProDtaFin = TabProDtaFin &ProVlrVda = ProVlrVda if ProVlrCus > 0 and ProIMCTot > 0 &MarProVlrVda = ProVlrCus / (ProIMCTot/100) Else &MarProVlrVda = 0 EndiF &ProVlrCus = ProVlrCus &ProIMC = ProIMC &MarProIMC = ProIMCTot &TabPrcIsTip = TabPrcIsTip &IsInsert = false if &TabPrcIsTip = TipoPrecoVenda.PRECO_COMPOSICAO txtComposto.Visible = 1 GXUITabsPanel_add.SelectTab(2) Else GXUITabsPanel_add.SelectTab(1) Endif Exit When none Tvaviso.Visible = 1 &TabPrcIsTip = TipoPrecoVenda.PRECO_NORMAL &TabPerAcr = &sdtColunasTabela.TabAcre &TabPerAnt = &sdtColunasTabela.TabAnt &TabDtaVct = &sdtColunasTabela.TabDtaBasVct For Each Order EmpCod, ProCod, ProGraCod Where EmpCod = &EmpCod Where ProCod = &ProCod Where ProGraCod = &ProGraCod when &ProGraCod > 1 &ProRef = ProGraRef &ProIsGra = ProIsGra &ProNom = ProNomGra &CodigoProduto = ProGraRef &ProVlrVda = ProVlrVda if ProVlrCus > 0 and ProIMCTot > 0 &MarProVlrVda = ProVlrCus / (ProIMCTot /100) Else &MarProVlrVda = 0 EndiF &ProVlrCus = ProVlrCus &ProIMC = ProIMC &MarProIMC = ProIMCTot &TabPrc1 = &ProVlrVda//round(ProPreVda + (ProPreVda * &TabPer1/100),2) do 'carregaValores' &IsInsert = true Exit When none If &ProCod <> 0 &ProNom = 'Produto não localizado!' msg(&ProNom) &CodigoProduto.SetEmpty() EndIF EndFor EndFor &TabProDtaFin.Enabled = 1 For Each Order EmpCod, TabCod, (TabCglCod) Where EmpCod = &EmpCod Where TabCod = &TabNum Where TabCglCod > &TabAltCod &TabProDtaFin.Enabled = 0 If &TabProDtaFin.IsEmpty() &TabProDtaFin = TabCglDtaFin - 1 EndIF Exit EndFor &TabProDtaIni.Enabled = 1 For Each Order EmpCod, TabCod, (TabCglCod) Where EmpCod = &EmpCod Where TabCod = &TabNum Where TabCglCod < &TabAltCod &TabProDtaIni.Enabled = 0 if &TabProDtaIni.IsEmpty() &TabProDtaIni = TabCglDtaFin + 1 EndIF Exit EndFor EndiF do 'NovaMarkup' EndSub Sub 'CarregaValores' If &TabIsPerCol1 = true if &sdtColunasTabela.TabPerCol2 <> 0 &TabPrc2 = round(&TabPrc1 + (&TabPrc1 * &sdtColunasTabela.TabPerCol2/100),2) Else &TabPrc2 = &TabPrc1 EndIF if &sdtColunasTabela.TabPerCol3 <> 0 &TabPrc3 = round(&TabPrc1 + (&TabPrc1 * &sdtColunasTabela.TabPerCol3/100),2) Else &TabPrc3 = &TabPrc1 EndIF if &sdtColunasTabela.TabPerCol4 <> 0 &TabPrc4 = round(&TabPrc1 + (&TabPrc1 * &sdtColunasTabela.TabPerCol4/100),2) Else &TabPrc4 = &TabPrc1 EndIF if &sdtColunasTabela.TabPerCol5 <> 0 &TabPrc5 = round(&TabPrc1 + (&TabPrc1 * &sdtColunasTabela.TabPerCol5/100),2) Else &TabPrc5 = &TabPrc1 EndIF if &sdtColunasTabela.TabPerCol6 <> 0 &TabPrc6 = round(&TabPrc1 + (&TabPrc1 * &sdtColunasTabela.TabPerCol6/100),2) Else &TabPrc6 = &TabPrc1 EndIF if &sdtColunasTabela.TabPerCol7 <> 0 &TabPrc7 = round(&TabPrc1 + (&TabPrc1 * &sdtColunasTabela.TabPerCol7/100),2) Else &TabPrc7 = &TabPrc1 EndIF if &sdtColunasTabela.TabPerCol8 <> 0 &TabPrc8 = round(&TabPrc1 + (&TabPrc1 * &sdtColunasTabela.TabPerCol8/100),2) Else &TabPrc8 = &TabPrc1 EndIF if &sdtColunasTabela.TabPerCol9 <> 0 &TabPrc9 = round(&TabPrc1 + (&TabPrc1 * &sdtColunasTabela.TabPerCol9/100),2) Else &TabPrc9 = &TabPrc1 EndIF Else if &sdtColunasTabela.TabPerCol2 <> 0 &TabPrc2 = round(&TabPrc1 + (&TabPrc1 * &sdtColunasTabela.TabPerCol2/100),2) Else &TabPrc2 = &TabPrc1 EndIF if &sdtColunasTabela.TabPerCol3 <> 0 &TabPrc3 = round(&TabPrc2 + (&TabPrc2 * &sdtColunasTabela.TabPerCol3/100),2) Else &TabPrc3 = &TabPrc2 EndIF if &sdtColunasTabela.TabPerCol4 <> 0 &TabPrc4 = round(&TabPrc3 + (&TabPrc3 * &sdtColunasTabela.TabPerCol4/100),2) Else &TabPrc4 = &TabPrc3 EndIF if &sdtColunasTabela.TabPerCol5 <> 0 &TabPrc5 = round(&TabPrc4 + (&TabPrc4 * &sdtColunasTabela.TabPerCol5/100),2) Else &TabPrc5 = &TabPrc4 EndIF if &sdtColunasTabela.TabPerCol6 <> 0 &TabPrc6 = round(&TabPrc5 + (&TabPrc5 * &sdtColunasTabela.TabPerCol6/100),2) Else &TabPrc6 = &TabPrc5 EndIF if &sdtColunasTabela.TabPerCol7 <> 0 &TabPrc7 = round(&TabPrc6 + (&TabPrc6 * &sdtColunasTabela.TabPerCol7/100),2) Else &TabPrc7 = &TabPrc6 EndIF if &sdtColunasTabela.TabPerCol8 <> 0 &TabPrc8 = round(&TabPrc7 + (&TabPrc7 * &sdtColunasTabela.TabPerCol8/100),2) Else &TabPrc8 = &TabPrc7 EndIF if &sdtColunasTabela.TabPerCol9 <> 0 &TabPrc9 = round(&TabPrc8 + (&TabPrc8 * &sdtColunasTabela.TabPerCol9/100),2) Else &TabPrc9 = &TabPrc8 EndIF EndIF EndSub Sub 'limpaCampos' &ProNom = '<-- INFORME O CÓDIGO DO PRODUTO' &ProVlrCus = 0 &ProVlrVda = 0 &MarProVlrVda = 0 &ProIMC = 0 &MarProIMC = 0 &TabProDtaFin.SetEmpty() &TabProDtaIni.SetEmpty() &TabPrc1 = 0 &TabPrc2 = 0 &TabPrc3 = 0 &TabPrc4 = 0 &TabPrc5 = 0 &TabPrc6 = 0 &TabPrc7 = 0 &TabPrc8 = 0 &TabPrc9 = 0 &TabPerAcr = 0 &TabPerAnt = 0 &TabDtaVct.SetEmpty() &IsInsert = true &TabPrcIsTip = tipoPrecoVenda.PRECO_NORMAL EndSub
